section_miscategorizations.text: She denies any bleeding or fractures.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Denial of a fracture is a diagnostic conclusion rather than a patient-reported symptom or history; however, it is unlikely to substantially mislead the reader.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a two over six systolic ejection murmur.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A systolic ejection murmur is a clinical finding that typically represents an active problem and would usually be synthesized in the Assessment; its presence in Findings is acceptable but slightly organizationally suboptimal.

section_miscategorizations.text: I'll order a hemoglobin a1c today as well.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a diagnostic test order that will generate future data; some templates place all orders in the Plan, but under the given semantics, Plan emphasizes treatments and instructions, while diagnostic workup is more closely tied to Findings.
